drifted.spec_text: apply SetZoom by adjusting camera zoom to the specified level
drifted.actual: Zoom level stored in CameraState but not applied to camera entity — no FOV or distance adjustment

drifted.spec_text: register with Aspire orchestrator for health checks and service discovery
drifted.actual: AppHost registers viewer but Program.fs never calls AddServiceDefaults — no /health endpoint

drifted.spec_text: REPL commands override the current camera state when received
drifted.actual: Interactive input applied after REPL commands, so interactive overwrites REPL in same frame
